name: Santa Fe Flank Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chiles and enough water to cover them in a 2-quart saucepan.
2. Heat to boiling. Boil, uncovered, for 5 minutes, then drain.
3. Remove stems from the chiles and finely chop them. Mix with the remaining ingredients except the steak.
4. Rub this mixture onto both sides of the steak. Cover and refrigerate for an hour.
5. Set oven control to broil. Place the beef on the rack in the broiler pan, about 3 inches from the heat.
6. Broil until browned, about 5 minutes.
7. Turn the beef and continue broiling until medium-rare, about 4 to 6 more minutes.
8. Cut the beef diagonally across the grain into very thin slices.
